item.description:
### Fixed - Codex sessions now end cleanly instead of lingering until they age out, so "hide idle after…" and history pruning treat them the same as Claude's. Needs Codex 0.145 or newer; older versions are unaffected. - Codex: after you answer a question, the session no longer keeps showing as waiting on you.
### Note - This update adds one more Codex hook, and Codex asks you to approve a hook before it will run it. Perch will tell you in Settings if there's anything to approve — run `/hooks` in Codex and trust Perch's entries.
